defects.defect_text: Excessive die wear in roll stand
Spiral marks / helical defects on tube
Mother chuck cylinder pin excessively worn
Mother chuck jaw fractured or cracked
Turning mechanism jammed or not rotating
Pneumatic solenoid valve stuck or not switching
Feed trolley structural plate weld failure
Guide rod bent or permanently deformed

root_causes.root_cause_text: Component misalignment leading to uneven stress
Debris contamination causing abrasion or blockage
Excessive vibration causing loosening and wear
Material fatigue due to repeated cyclic loading
Formation of vapor cavities in liquid causing shock and erosion
Moisture entry into enclosures or fluids
Failure of motor windings due to short/ground
Dust accumulation causing thermal or electrical issues
Loose fittings in fluid or air lines
Damage or scoring on cylinder rod
Wear of guide shoes or guiding elements
Mechanical obstruction or jam in cylinder
Unstable electrical supply or voltage issues
Improper storage of parts or tools
Loss of supply air pressure in pneumatic system
Moisture contamination in air lines reducing effectiveness

corrective_actions.action_text: Adjust alignment of components to specification
Perform motor insulation and surge tests
Remove mechanical obstruction or foreign object
Perform NDT such as dye-penetrant or ultrasonic
Update software/firmware to latest stable release
Repair network infrastructure or replace bad components
Conduct oil analysis and replace if degraded
Verify and apply correct torque per spec
Check and service air dryer for moisture removal

meta.coverage_estimate: Comprehensive — representative defects for every system and sub-system (recommended to extend further with site-specific OEM spares and failure logs)

validation.defect_min_links: each defect has 2–5 root causes and 2–5 actions
validation.notes: Codes and mappings derived from provided reference JSON and expanded system taxonomy (one additional level added: System -> Subsystem -> Component -> Defect). Verify site-specific part numbers and OEM fault codes before deployment.
